SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.synthesis

Class CompressionDuty

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.synthesis.CompressionDuty
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class CompressionDuty extends Object implements Serializable
Declarative description of a compression problem handed to FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuildCompression(CompressionDuty).

A compression duty specifies a feed stream and a target discharge pressure. The synthesis engine decides on the number of compression stages from the overall pressure ratio (limited per-stage by getMaxStageRatio()), inserts inter-stage coolers to control discharge temperature, and returns a fully wired ProcessSystem with all units named.

Defaults follow industry rules of thumb (NORSOK P-100, GPSA Engineering Data Book):

  • Maximum per-stage pressure ratio: 3.5 (centrifugal compressors, gas service)
  • Inter-stage cooler outlet temperature: 35 °C (typical ambient + 10 °C approach)
  • Polytropic efficiency: 0.78
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Constructor Details

    • CompressionDuty

      public CompressionDuty(String name, StreamInterface feed, double dischargePressureBara)
      Creates a compression duty.
      Parameters:
      name - short identifier used in the generated flowsheet
      feed - the feed stream; must have been run() so that flow, T and P are valid
      dischargePressureBara - target discharge pressure of the train, in bara; must be strictly greater than the feed pressure

  • Method Details

    • setMaxStageRatio

      public CompressionDuty setMaxStageRatio(double ratio)
      Sets the maximum per-stage pressure ratio. Above this, the engine adds another stage.
      Parameters:
      ratio - per-stage ratio (must be > 1); default 3.5
      Returns:
      this duty for chaining

    • setInterstageCoolerTemperatureC

      public CompressionDuty setInterstageCoolerTemperatureC(double tC)
      Sets the inter-stage cooler outlet temperature in degrees Celsius.
      Parameters:
      tC - outlet temperature in °C; default 35 °C
      Returns:
      this duty for chaining

    • setPolytropicEfficiency

      public CompressionDuty setPolytropicEfficiency(double eta)
      Sets the polytropic efficiency of each compression stage.
      Parameters:
      eta - polytropic efficiency in the open interval (0, 1); default 0.78
      Returns:
      this duty for chaining

    • setAfterCooler

      public CompressionDuty setAfterCooler(boolean enabled, double tC)
      Configures whether a final after-cooler is added downstream of the last stage and at what temperature.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to add an after-cooler (default), false to leave the last stage discharge uncooled
      tC - after-cooler outlet temperature in °C; ignored when enabled is false
      Returns:
      this duty for chaining

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the duty identifier.
      Returns:
      non-null name

    • getFeed

      public StreamInterface getFeed()
      Returns the feed stream.
      Returns:
      the feed

      Returns the target discharge pressure in bara.
      Returns:
      discharge pressure

    • getMaxStageRatio

      public double getMaxStageRatio()
      Returns the maximum per-stage pressure ratio.
      Returns:
      max per-stage ratio

    • getInterstageCoolerTemperatureC

      public double getInterstageCoolerTemperatureC()
      Returns the inter-stage cooler outlet temperature in °C.
      Returns:
      inter-stage cooler temperature

    • getPolytropicEfficiency

      public double getPolytropicEfficiency()
      Returns the polytropic efficiency for each stage.
      Returns:
      polytropic efficiency

    • hasAfterCooler

      public boolean hasAfterCooler()
      Returns whether an after-cooler is included downstream of the last stage.
      Returns:
      true when an after-cooler is configured

    • getFinalCoolerTemperatureC

      public double getFinalCoolerTemperatureC()
      Returns the after-cooler outlet temperature in °C (ignored when hasAfterCooler() is false).
      Returns:
      after-cooler outlet temperature
